title: Batched verify HIP-graph replay made exact: keyed-barrier epochs + stale scratch were the divergence; verify wall -34% at B=3
workload: quicksort 90-tok prompt, decode 32, chain_attn_mode=batched, persistent_device, greedy
command: python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --backend hip_gfx1100 --proposal-impl persistent_device --chain-attn-mode batched --candidate-budget {B} --decode-tokens 32 --graph-mode {off|auto} --prompt-tokens $(cat quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt)

root_cause.bug1_stale_scratch_commit: _canonicalize_decode_scratch re-reserves workspace names at rows=1 after every cycle; replay cycles never re-reserve rows=B+1, so _commit_bulk_linear_states read tree_*_state from the wrong buffers. Fix: snapshot capture-time scratch maps into the graph entry, restore before commit; skip canonicalize while a verifier graph is cached.
root_cause.bug2_keyed_barrier_epoch: Keyed staged-rotate barriers (selected down staged GEMV, HIPENGINE_SELECTED_MOE_DOWN_STAGED default-on) pass a host-side cumulative (count,epoch) by value. Graph capture froze cycle-1 epochs: replays skip the producer->consumer spin (silent race, ~1.4-3.7 logit drift, run-to-run nondeterminism), and any direct pass after a replay spins forever (GPU hang). Fix: capture-safe memset-per-launch barrier mode whenever the verify graph path is active.
root_cause.diagnostics: off/auto byte-identical through cycle 8, first flip cycle 9 root argmax; trunk L1 drift from replay#2; per-layer KV/conv/recurrent slot checksums identical -> not state; off pass2==pass3 kernel sequence (rocprof) == auto replay sequence -> not variants; A/B SELECTED_MOE_DOWN_STAGED=0 -> exact -> keyed barrier confirmed

correctness_gate: exact_ar_match=true (spec tokens == same-session AR greedy tokens) at B=1 and B=3, decode 32, quicksort prompt; acceptance pattern byte-identical to graph-off
claim: Graph replay on the batched verify path is now exact and cuts verify wall 33.3->22.1 ms/cycle (B=3, -34%), C_B 4.83->3.57, MTP/AR 0.49->0.67x. NOT yet break-even (needs C_B<=2.38); remaining gap is proposer+draft host time (~10 ms/cycle) and verify busy.
next: graph the MTP proposer drafts, p_min=0.5 (#100), gated k=2 tree (#99 visible 2.82)
